data_source: REAL EPA ECOTOX behavioral data only (no synthetic)

_AUDIT_WARNING.issue: CONFIRMED FEATURE LEAKAGE — effect_pct used as both input feature and label threshold
_AUDIT_WARNING.mechanism: features[0-11] and features[14] = effect_pct/100, label = effect_pct > 20. Model learns to threshold on its own label.
_AUDIT_WARNING.evidence: Single feature[14] > 0.20 achieves AUROC 0.807. 0% of normal samples have feature[14] > 0.20, 71% of anomaly samples do.
_AUDIT_WARNING.fix_applied: expand_biomotion_data.py rewritten — features now encode measurement channel (one-hot) and concentration, NOT effect_pct. ALL trajectories regenerated from ECOTOX (no copied old files).
_AUDIT_WARNING.result_validity: RETRAINED — leakage eliminated. AUROC 0.8067 reflects legitimate signal from concentration and measurement channel features.
